name: io.github.apertura-ai/arquestra
title: Arquestra — Scientific Computing Orchestration
description: AI orchestration platform for computational chemistry, HPC workflows, and materials science. Create and manage runs, connect to the full orchestration loop (fetch_turn / submit_response), list machines and domain packs. Supports OAuth 2.0 PKCE — no token pasting required.

headers.description: Machine token (arqmt_…) or OAuth access token (arqoa_…). Generate at https://arquestra.ai.

arquestra_token.description: Arquestra machine token (arqmt_…). Generate at https://arquestra.ai → workspace setup. OAuth flow also supported — see README.
